body_html:
florida flamingoes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

FYI. Amy is asking for info about the Flamingos.
Do you want me to respond
or you? If me, what should I tell her?

Darren

Date: Wed, 11 Jan 2006 22:31:19 -0400 (AST)
Subject: Re: LSJ
From: bioimpact@islands.vi
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Hi Darren,

I am waiting for Bill's drawings. He was going to
send them to me for
review. I am off island right now (Cairo) and will
be back over the
weekend. Bill wanted to be able to submit early
next week. I hope to see
his drawings soon.

I finally got information for Jeffery on the
Flamingos! I spent quite a
bit of time talking with Will Coles of local Fish
and Wildlife and then
Felix Lopez again of Federal Fish and Wildlife.

Bird Flu will make an already difficult situation
worse. I need to find
out from Jeffery where the Flamingos are coming
from. If they are USA
birds it will help. But there is a great fear right
now of importing
birds which have contact with "wild birds".

Amy
